arts.ttl: Aston Villa official in Portugal on Thursday evening – Transfer planning ahead of summer
arts.sum: Aston Villa had an official in Portugal on Thursday evening to watch Porto take on Roma in the Europa League. That’s according to O Jogo and Record, who report that Aston Villa were one of several English teams to send a scout to watch the game. They were there alongside Arsenal, Manchester United, Borussia Dortmund The post Aston Villa official in Portugal on Thursday evening – Transfer planning ahead of summer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Fresh Aston Villa transfer link emerges with exciting winger who is a 'great talent'
arts.sum: Aston Villa have been credited with an interest in FC Copenhagen winger Roony Bardghji ahead of the opening of the summer transfer window. Copenhagen manager Jacob Neestrup has previously described Bardghji as a 'great talent' who he has backed to hit similar heights upon his highly anticipated return from injury, and in doing so inevitably attract interest from the big clubs on the continent.

arts.ttl: Chelsea suffer fresh injury blow to key man as five ruled out of Aston Villa
arts.sum: Fellow striker Marc Guiu has also suffered a hamstring injury and while there are signs in other areas of the Chelsea squad that the injury problems are relenting with players slowly rejoining training, Maresca will be without those players for the next couple of weeks - and perhaps closer to next month's international break. Senegalese striker Jackson, who has scored nine goals this season and is the club's top scorer, was forced off in the 2-1 win at Stamford Bridge and scan results have confirmed to boss Enzo Maresca that he'll be missing for between six and eight weeks, meaning an appearance when the Blues visit Villa Park next weekend is out of the question.

arts.ttl: FA Cup fifth-round TV schedule announced as BBC and ITV both get huge matches
arts.sum: Kick-off times and TV schedules for the eight FA Cup fifth-round matches have been confirmed, with holders Manchester United and 2023 winner Manchester City both involved

arts.ttl: Back to the Beginning at Villa Park: Tickets on sale now
arts.sum: A very limited number of tickets are now on sale for the Back To The Beginning concert at Villa Park, which will be headlined by Ozzy Osbourne and the original members of Black Sabbath. Osbourne will be joined by Tony Iommi, Geezer Butler and Bill Ward for Black Sabbath's first performance in 20 years. The Back to the Beginning event takes place on Saturday, July 5 and will feature sets from Metallica, Slayer, Pantera, Gojira, Halestorm, Alice In Chains, Lamb Of God, Anthrax, Mastodon and many more. All profits from the show will be shared equally between the following charities: Cure Parkinson’s, Birmingham Children’s Hospital and Acorn Children’s Hospice, a Children’s Hospice supported by Aston Villa. Back to the Beginning at Villa Park Buy Tickets Hospitality tickets are also available, with lounge, restaurant and box packages to suit everyone. For more details and to view the full packages, click below. View Packages Please note, we anticipate extremely high demand for this event so make sure you get in quickly to avoid disappointment! You can get in touch by phoning 08000 149 346, emailing EventHospitality@avfc.co.uk or via our ticketing website below. Book Hospitality Online To book tickets online, you'll need an AVFC Digital Membership with a linked Fan ID. To create a digital membership or sign into an existing account, please click here. For more information on linking a Fan ID, please click here.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa announce new contract for 'very technical' forward
arts.sum: Forward Hayward helped Villa win the Premier League National Tournament in 2023, playing in an age group above his years, when they emerged victorious in the final against Reading. Aston Villa youngster Vinnie Hayward has made progress in the academy and has begun to feature for the club's under 18s

arts.ttl: Triple up on Villa - FPL tips & team of the week
arts.sum: It's an easy choice to triple up on Liverpool and Aston Villa assets this double gameweek, writes Thomas Woods, but should you also use a chip to take full advantage?

arts.ttl: Inside Man United's very own civil war: Current stars embroiled in public spats with club legends, fans clash with Sir Jim Ratcliffe and Jadon Sancho mocks club by suggesting Marcus Rashford is now 'free' despite still being on payroll
arts.sum: Players are taking on criticism from pundits, fans are protesting against rises such as ticketing, while social media has whipped up a storm or two for comments left on sites such as Instagram.

arts.ttl: 'Tough' - Former Manchester United coach offers theory on Marcus Rashford's exit
arts.sum: Kieran McKenna has worked with Marcus Rashford at Man Utd and the Ipswich Town boss will try and stop the forward when they face Aston Villa this weekend.

arts.ttl: Pau Torres shares injury update as Aston Villa defender closes in on return
arts.sum: Aston Villa defender Pau Torres has posted a video of his recovery as he edges closer to making a long-awaited return to action following the injury he suffered back in December, in the 2-2 draw at home to Brighton and Hove Albion. Pau Torres shares injury update as Aston Villa defender closes in on return
